summary: Iteration 126: COMPREHENSIVE HARDENING VERIFICATION COMPLETE. All critical fixes for honorary licensee $0.00 profit bug verified working. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: Admin simulation for Rizza Miles (honorary_fa) shows Account Value=$6,530.60, Total Profit=$1,530.60, Growth Projections load successfully. Direct login as Rizza also shows correct values. No 'Failed to load projections' error anywhere.

issues: Minor: Rizza Miles appears under 'Honorary FA (Family) View' not 'Honorary Licensee View' - this is correct behavior since her license_type is 'honorary_fa', but may confuse admins looking for her

critical_code_review_comments: get_member_details (server.py line 3722-3770) correctly wraps honorary calculation in try/except with fallback
All numeric values properly cast with float() to handle MongoDB Decimal128/string types
stats dict includes 'starting_amount' and 'license_type' fields as expected
_is_honorary() helper (calculations.py line 13-18) handles case-insensitive checks correctly

critical_admin_simulation_bug.issue: Admin simulation showed $0.00 profit for honorary licensees
critical_admin_simulation_bug.root_cause: get_member_details missing try/except and float() casts on honorary calculation
critical_admin_simulation_bug.fix: Wrapped honorary calculation in try/except, added float() casts, added fallback to current_amount
evidence: Admin simulation dashboard shows 'Welcome back, Rizza!' with Account Value=$6,530.60, Total Profit=$1,530.60

projections_loading.issue: 'Failed to load projections' on licensee dashboard

health_check.issue: Admin licensee health check showed broken licensees

context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical bugs from the honorary licensee $0.00 profit issue are fixed and verified. Admin simulation works correctly via 'Honorary FA (Family) View' > select Rizza Miles > Start Simulation. Rizza's license_type is 'honorary_fa' so she appears under 'Honorary FA (Family) View' NOT 'Honorary Licensee View'. Direct login as Rizza also shows correct dashboard values. All 6 honorary licensees pass health check.
